Localization.Description: An attempt to perform an operation on a trail

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is changing trail {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting trail {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create trail {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change trail {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete trail {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating trail {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
